title: attributes — data retention windows
description: Definitions + active sets retained while referenced. Superseded set versions preserved as long as ANY host record snapshots them (historic-render integrity). This is a compliance policy — deleting a superseded set breaks historic assessments.

conditions: no active set references this definition
no historic host record snapshots a set that references this definition
policies.description: Retained indefinitely while active. After deprecation + no references + 7 years cold: hard delete.

conditions: no host record has attribute_set_snapshot_id = this set
policies.description: Active + draft sets retained indefinitely. Superseded sets preserved 7 years post-supersession OR indefinitely if any host record still snapshots them. This is a LOAD-BEARING invariant — deleting a snapshotted set breaks historic assessment render.
Cascades with parent set. Independent purge only via soft-delete restore window.
